name: eightbitconcepts-research
description: Read-only access to the 8bitconcepts enterprise-AI research corpus. Preview-stage manifest — the tool surface is declared but the JSON-RPC endpoint is NOT yet hosted (GitHub Pages is static-only). Until a Cloudflare Worker fronts /mcp, agents should fetch the corpus directly via /research.json and /research/{slug}.html.

tools.name: list_research_papers
tools.description: Return the full index of research papers with slug, title, summary, and publication date. Mirrors https://8bitconcepts.com/research.json.

tools.name: get_research_paper
tools.description: Return the full markdown content of a specific research paper by slug. Content is also reachable directly at https://8bitconcepts.com/research/{slug}.html.
